content: \ GIET UNIVERSITY, GUNUPUR DrST-RAYAGADA, (ODISHA) PrN -7 6s022 No: [ { I GIETIJ/ Ph.D.12022-23 (winter) Dated: Ll 212023 ADMISSION INTO THE Ph.D. PROGRAMME-2022-23 (winter) Applications are invited for admission into the Ph.D. programme (Full TimelPart Time) - 2022-23 (Winter) as per the details given below: st. No. School Branch Eligibility for admission into the Ph.D. Programme. 1 SOET CIVIL 60% Marks in M.Tech (Civil Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. CSE 60% Marks in M.Tech (CSE/IT Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. CHEMICAL 60% Marks in M.Tech (Chemical Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. ECE 60% Marks in M.Tech. (ECE Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. EEE/EE 60% Marks in M.Tech. (EEE/ EE Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. MECHANICAL 60% Marks in M.Tech. (Mechanical Branch) or Equivalent of as per UGC norms. 2 SOS PHYSICS 55% Marks in M.Sc (Physics) or Equivalent or as per UGC norms CHEMISRTY 55% Marks in M.Sc (Chemisrty) or Equivalent or as per UGC norns MATHEMATICS 55% Marks in M.Sc (Mathematics) or Equivalent or as per UGC norms BOTANY 55% Marks in M.Sc (Botany) or Equivalent or as per UGS norms. ZOOLOGY 55% Marks in M.Sc (Zoology) or Equivalent or as per UGC norms. BIO-TECH 55% Marks in M.Sc (Bio-Tech) or Equivalent or as per UGC noffns. Relaxation of 5o/o at PG level will be allowed for SC/ST/OBC/?H candidates. Admission Procedure: l. Applicants can download the application form the University website (www.giet.edu) and should submit the duly,filled in application form along with certificates &'mark sheets of UG, PG, UGC- NET/GATE/CSIR-JRF/M.Phil. And application fees on or before 25-02-2023 by E-mail : deanadmission@ giet.edu. PTO Page-z 2. Application fees of Rs.1000/- (for all categories of candidates) is to be deposited online fuMu€iet.edd through E-payment or Google Pay /Phone Pay in the following Account of G.[ET University. '!' I Account Number 38401477840 2 Type of Account Current Account J Name of the Bank and Branch SBI, GIET Campus Branch, , Dist- Rayagada. IFSC Code Number sBrNoo17769 3. Incomplete application or non submission of required documents shall be summarily rejected. 4. Admissions will be made through Entrance Test followed by the interview as per the UGC Regulations. Candidates, who have qualified in the UGC- NET/GATE/CSIR-JRF, are exempted from appearing the entrance test on production of the required certificate /letter issued by the competent authority. However, they are required to appear the interviedviva-voce test conducted . by the respective departments on the schedule date and time. Preference will be given to the. National Eligibility Test Qualified candidates as per UGC norms. 5. Reservation policy of the state government will be followed for admission. 6. The syllabus of the Entrance Test shall consist of 50% Research Methodolo gy and 50yo subject specific. 7. An interviedviva-voce will be organrzed by the respective department, where the candidates are required to discuss the research interest/ area through a presentation before the RAC of the department. 8. Candidate qualifuing in the entrance examinations have no right to claim for admission and the decision taken by the University authority shall be final. Admission shall be made as per the vacancy position ofthe different branches. 9. For any clarifications, please mail to Ph.D. section:- phdsection@giet.edu Important Dates Sl.No Activities Date Lines 1 Last date of submission of form 25-02-2023 Scrutiny of application forms 28-02-2023 tJ Issue of Admit cards 07-03-2023 4 Date & Time of Entrance Test 12-03-2023 5 Declaration of Result of Entrance Test t5-03-2023 6 Conduct of Interview / Viva-Voce 20-03-2023 7 Publication of list of finally selected candidates 2t-03-2023 8 Date of Admissions 22-03 -2023 to 3l-03 -2023 9 Starting of Course Work classes 08-04-2023 *,t ,,)o #;:t;'T-rri'r; GIET University, Gunupur 4 2
summary: Candidates, who have qualified in the UGC- NET/GATE/CSIR-JRF, are exempted from appearing the entrance test on production of the required certificate /letter issued by the competent authority. The syllabus of the Entrance Test shall consist of 50% Research Methodolo gy and 50yo subject specific. Candidate qualifuing in the entrance examinations have no right to claim for admission and the decision taken by the University authority shall be final.
